# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Create Envoy configuration with HTTP filters for request processing. Define filter chains including router filter for traffic routing. Set up retry policies and timeout configurations for backend connections. This is for our service mesh data plane.
# Category: envoy_authz_filter_missing

---
filters:
  - name: "envoy.http_connection_manager"
    config:
      stat_prefix: "ingress_router"
      route_config:
        virtual_hosts:
          - domains: ["*"]
            routes:
              - match:
                  prefix: "/"
                route:
                  cluster: "cluster1"
              - match:
                  prefix: "/api"
                route:
                  cluster: "cluster2"
          - domains: ["*"]
            routes:
              - match:
                  prefix: "/"
                route:
                  cluster: "cluster3"
              - match:
                  prefix: "/api"
                route:
                  cluster: "cluster4"
      http_filters:
        - name: "envoy.router"
          config:
            strict_mode: true
            case_sensitive: false
            xff_num_trusted_hops: 3
            allowed_downstream_ips:
              - 192.0.2.0/24
              - 198.51.100.0/24
        - name: "envoy.retry"
          config:
            retry_on: "connect-failure,connection-failure,refused-stream"
            num_retries: 3
            per_try_timeout:
              seconds: 10
            retry_backoff:
              base_interval: 5s
              max_interval: 60s
        - name: "envoy.hedge"
          config:
            hedge_on: "all"
            initial_request_timeout:
              seconds: 10
            additional_request_timeout:
              seconds: 10
            max_multiplier: 4
        - name: "envoy.timeout"
          config:
            timeout_headers: ["x-envoy-upstream-rq-timeout"]
            request_timeout:
              seconds: 30
            connection_idle_timeout:
              seconds: 60
            h2_session_max_concurrent_requests: 1000
        - name: "envoy.router"
          config:
            strict_mode: true
            case_sensitive: false
            xff_num_trusted_hops: 3
            allowed_downstream_ips:
              - 192.0.2.0/24
              - 198.51.100.0/24
